questions.prompt: Put the four triage questions in the correct order.
items: Should this actually run on this device?
What scope does the policy need?
questions.explanation: Identify the file, judge whether it should run, decide how broadly to scope the resulting policy, then pick approve / approve-with-ringfence / deny / escalate.

questions.prompt: An end user requests a tool only they need for a one-off project. The matching application panel shows a clean built-in match. What scope is most appropriate for the resulting policy?
questions.explanation: One user, one device, one app, one project. Single-computer-application-only is the narrowest scope and the most defensible. Wider scopes give the permit to endpoints that don't need it.
